prompt: Industrial product photograph in a stone fabrication hall: a fan of seven round velcro sanding pads arranged in a gradient from coarse black silicon-carbide grit through medium grey to fine cream and translucent polishing pads, laid on the polished edge of a dark grey marble table with white veining.
